name: TravelGuide — Generate major airport pages
description: Weekly cloud agent that generates Markdown guide pages for the world's busiest airports not yet covered. Opens a PR when new pages are created.

workflow.prompt:
You maintain TravelGuide in this repository — one practical Markdown page per airport under content/airports/.

Each run:
1. Read lib/major-airports.ts for the ranked list of busiest airports (ACI 2024).
2. List content/airports/*.md to see which IATA codes already have pages.
3. Pick the next batch of missing airports starting from the highest rank (up to 10 per run).
4. For each missing airport, run: pnpm generate:airport <IATA>
   (AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is available in the environment.)
5. Skim each generated file for obvious placeholder URLs or empty sections; fix frontmatter country names to use full country names, not ISO codes.
6. Do not overwrite existing pages unless they are clearly broken.

Quality gate:
- Preserve the heading structure from existing pages (see content/airports/lhr.md).
- Use real official airport URLs in frontmatter sources.
- Skip generation if AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is missing — report that instead.

If you created new airport pages, open a pull request titled "feat(airports): add guides for major hubs" with a bullet per airport (rank, IATA, name).
If all top-100 major airports already have pages, reply with a short status note — do not open a PR.
